description: A threaded discussion comment on an article (or another comment). Stored under the commenter's DID; `parent` is the replied-to comment URI when this is a reply.

subject.description: The article (or content) this comment is attached to.

parent.description: When set, this comment is a reply to the referenced comment.

quoteText.description: Optional quote from the subject being commented on.

sectionRef.description: Anchor / section identifier within the subject.
